title: Fix empty room doors staying closed

log.context: Fix empty room doors staying closed

Service is running. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** In `initFloor()` (dungeon-loop.ts, line ~203), rooms of type `start`, `treasure`, and `rest` were correctly marked `cleared: true` when the protocol layout was built, but their doors were never opened. The `openDoorsForRoom()` function was only called from the tick loop's room-clear check (step 12), which skips already-cleared rooms (`if (room.cleared) continue;`). So these rooms had closed doors with no way to open them.

**Fix applied** ...(truncated)
